title: Budget guard — maxTurns / token-budget ceiling stops and reports rather than looping

tests.summary: sdk-budget-ok — Budget guard block (2 tests) green: a result with subtype 'error_max_turns' yields stoppedReason 'max_turns' (stop + report); a high-usage result against a low budgetTokens ceiling yields stoppedReason 'budget_exceeded' and breaks the consume loop with usedTokens >= ceiling. SDK sessions have no default turn limit / no timeout, so the adapter caps maxTurns (default 12) and an optional per-session token budget.

notes: Prevents an unbounded loop from burning paid credits on Z.ai/DeepSeek/MiniMax. The ceiling is reported via the structured awaitResponse stoppedReason, not by scraping.
